top.title: Artemis II leaves Earth's orbit on track for far side of the Moon
top.summary: The mission's last, big push on its lunar journey takes humans out of the Earth's orbit for the first time since 1972.

top.title: Watch: Artemis II astronauts speak from space
top.summary: The crew on board the Artemis II spoke by video link, sharing messages for their families and experiences of the trip so far.

top.title: Trump removes US Attorney General Pam Bondi
top.summary: Bondi's time as top US law enforcement officer was overshadowed by her handling of the Epstein files.

top.title: Fewer UK adults posting on social media, Ofcom finds
top.summary: Some experts believe it highlights a social media shift as platforms boost short video.

top.title: Elon Musk's SpaceX set to be worth $1 trillion with planned public listing
top.summary: The company’s public stock debut is set to be one of the most valuable in history, and could make Musk the world's first trillionaire.

top.title: Peppa Pig and Transformers owner Hasbro hit by cyber-attack
top.summary: The firm says its operations remain open but says the hack "may result in some delays".

title.#text: Chatbots are now prescribing psychiatric drugs
AO3 is finally out of beta after 17 years
